creator: jaakko.hyvatti@iki.fi
text:
I am the author of the picprog-1.0.1 package.  I just noticed
it has been included in FreeBSD distribution for some years.
Cool!  Just one note: the URL mentioned in documents:

http://www.pp.htv.fi/jhyvatti/pic/

should be changed to:

http://www.iki.fi/hyvatti/pic/

..in order to be reachable forever.  This address is redirection
to where the pages happen to be located.  Thanks and great work!
